The '''shadow barnacle''' was a [[Silica parasite/Legends|silica parasite]] living on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Field Guide" />

This small crustacean anchored to buildings by feeder roots through which it absorbed nutrients. It retracted into its shell when threatened. The shadow barnacle reproduced by releasing "[[Egg/Legends|egg]] seeds" and "[[sperm]] pollens" into the [[Atmosphere/Legends|air]].<ref name="Field Guide" />

It consisted of a tubular [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]], a shelled pod, and retractable anchor tendrils. It could also move by using its claw-[[Limb/Legends|legs]], and it had external [[gill]] filaments that could be withdrawn into its mouth.<ref name="Field Guide" />

They were able to survive the [[Terraforming/Legends|vongforming]] of Coruscant.{{Fact}}
